data_description.name: A room or area name works best, e.g. "Living Room"

data_description.brightness: One mapping per line as group:light. Example: "60:100" means at 60% group brightness, this light reaches 100%.

error.invalid_brightness: Invalid entry "{error_entry}". Use the format "X:Y" where X is 1–100 and Y is 0–100, e.g. "40:100"
